name: s2-elderly-guardian-agent
description: S2 零隐私老人健康哨兵。多模态感知并本地记录活动日志，仅向总线广播跌倒预警，不包含任何物理越权操作。
author: Space2.world (Miles Xiang)

S2_BUS_ENDPOINT.description: Optional local endpoint to broadcast health events.

directories.s2_bas_governance: PERSISTENCE: Stores anonymized ADL (Activities of Daily Living) JSON logs in elderly_care/.
